notes: Unresolvable district scopes (no queryable official boundary): COUNTY_COUNCIL. Contests/measures scoped to them are hidden rather than shown to the wrong voters.

measures.jurisdiction: Adams County Park and Recreation District No. 2
measures.title: Maintenance and Operations Levy (Washtucna Pool)
measures.what_it_does: Authorizes a one-year maintenance and operations levy for the Washtucna Pool.
measures.cost_line: $85,000, approximately $0.83 per $1,000 of assessed value, collected in 2027.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.
